name: Wild Fiber
description: Pale valley grass, strong enough to weave. Locals swear this is where fiber optics really come from.

name: Fallen Wood
description: Dry branches gathered beneath the trees.

name: Smooth Stone
description: River-worn and pleasantly heavy.

name: Pond Clay
description: Soft red clay from the pond's edge.

name: Glow Moss
description: Moss that hums with faint green light.

name: River Shell
description: A pearly spiral left by the current.

name: Cloud Cotton
description: Fluff that drifts down from the high peaks.

name: Spirit Resin
description: Amber sap that remembers warmth.

name: Moon Petals
description: They open only for patient gatherers.

name: Storm Glass
description: Fused by Hollow lightning. Rare and strange.

name: Lost Seed
description: One of Piproot's scattered treasures. It glows softly.

name: Signal Lens
description: A hand-woven fiber lens that focuses the tower's beam. Surprisingly good bandwidth.

name: Debug Lantern
description: Mira's old lantern, rewired. It renders the invisible — spirits, signals, stray packets. Use with F.

name: Willow Fishing Rod
description: Mira's trusty rod. Use with F near water.

name: Gathering Gloves
description: Sturdy gloves for thorny work.

name: Repair Hammer
description: For mending what the storms shook loose.

name: Hearth Stew
description: Tavi's recipe. Warms from the toes up.

name: Berry Tea
description: Sweet, tart, and best shared.

name: Woven Charm
description: A small gift that says 'I was thinking of you.'

name: Flower Wreath
description: A crown of oversized valley blooms.

name: Dawn Minnow
description: Common, quick, and always cheerful about it.

name: Amber Carp
description: Its scales hold a little sunset.

name: Whisker Trout
description: Wise-looking. Probably isn't.

name: Starlight Eel
description: Rises only under night skies. Glimmers like the Waylights once did.
